description: Mid top styling on vans' Edgemont shoe is crafted to guard the higher impact areas of your foot. Staying true to the authentic sport and fashion style that he brand is known to deliver, these Edgemont shoes are a class apart. Strategic overlay placement ensures good shock absorption and the cupsole styling is to die for. Grab a pair of these before its too late! UpperMid top styling on fabric, synthetic and suede uppers Triple stitching on the toe boxVanslite super-soft molded and contoured EVA sock liner Central lacing systemInternal elastic tongue staysPadded tongue and collar for instep comfortMidsoleDie cut EVA midsoleOutsoleMulticolour SBR rubber outsole with Vans' WaffleGrip patterning and a suction point for the big toe regionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
